ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market participant */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* Unique API key for each market participant */,
  "bm_unit_id" TEXT /* BM Unit Id of the market participant */,
  "bm_unit_type" TEXT /* BM Unit Type of the market participant */,
  "lead_party_name" TEXT /* Lead Party Name of the market participant */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy transaction */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market participant involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the energy transaction */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy (e.g., generation, consumption) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of energy involved in the transaction */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of energy */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, settled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balancing_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balancing process */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy transaction being balanced */,
  "balancing_date" TEXT /* Date of the balancing process */,
  "imbalance" REAL /* Imbalance value after balancing */,
  "adjustment_amount" REAL /* Amount of adjustment made */,
  "adjusted_total_cost" REAL /* Adjusted total cost after balancing */,
  "balancing_status" TEXT /* Status of the balancing process (e.g., pending, settled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settlement_processes" (
  "settlement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each settlement process */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the balancing process being settled */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date of the settlement process */,
  "invoice_amount" REAL /* Invoice amount for the settlement */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "settlement_status" TEXT /* Status of the settlement process (e.g., pending, settled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("settlement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "settlement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the settlement process being invoiced */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date of the invoice */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of payment (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disputes" (
  "dispute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispute */,
  "settlement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the settlement process being disputed */,
  "dispute_date" TEXT /* Date of the dispute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dispute */,
  "dispute_status" TEXT /* Status of the dispute (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_participant_types" (
  "participant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market participant type */,
  "participant_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the market participant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market participant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_participant_roles" (
  "participant_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market participant role */,
  "participant_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the market participant role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market participant role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_participant_market_participant_types" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market participant */,
  "participant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market participant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id", "participant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_participant_market_participant_roles" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market participant */,
  "participant_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market participant role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id", "participant_role_id")
)
